# Lineicons (Free tier)

- **Source**: https://github.com/LineiconsHQ/Lineicons
- **Site**: https://lineicons.com
- **Author**: Lineicons
- **License**: MIT (see `LICENSE.md`)
- **Version fetched**: depth-1 clone, 2026-04-21
- **Icon count**: 607 SVGs (free tier — pro tier has more)
- **Style**: 24x24 stroke set, single weight
- **Raw SVG path**: `assets/svgs/`
- **Icon fonts**: `assets/icon-fonts/` (woff/ttf + css)

## Contents

- `assets/svgs/` — 607 SVG files
- `assets/icon-fonts/` — icon font variants with css
- `LICENSE.md` — MIT
- `README.md` — upstream readme

## Consolidate notes

- Similar grammar to Feather/Lucide but with distinct brand-logo glyphs (social icons) that the others lack.
- Icon-font is retained in case vector glyph rendering is preferred for a retro UI layer.
- Free tier is the clean-useful subset; pro tier (paid) was not fetched.
